name: Golden Crab Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from the bread and cut slices into cubes.
2. Beat together the eggs, milk, and seasonings in a bowl.
3. Stir in the bread cubes, cheese, and crab meat until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch X 13-inch baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until the center is set.
6. Substitute 2 cups of shrimp, or a combination of shrimp and crab to total 2 cups, if desired.
